相关PoC:
yellowkey-bitlocker: Manage and recover BitLocker encrypted drives with this tool for Windows 11 recovery key management and educational study of CVE-2026-45585.

item.title: CVE-2026-31431 - CVE-2026-31431 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-31431-Linux-Copy-Fail: Exploit CVE-2026-31431 on Linux using a Rust implementation to achieve local privilege escalation via an arbitrary page cache write primitive.
copyfail-rs: Exploit and detect CVE-2026-31431 vulnerabilities using a static binary that monitors system integrity and bypasses PAM authentication.

CVE-2026-31802: Demonstrate and analyze the CVE-2026-31802 path traversal vulnerability in npm tar, enabling arbitrary file overwrite via symlink extraction.
